title: codereview-pass1: to_bytes/from_bytes not updated for current_channel in wire format
description: After adding current_channel to signed_data(), the to_bytes() still omits it from serialization (channel not sent), from_bytes() does not parse it from data[93]. This will cause signature mismatch across impls (Python vs Rust/C). Also update FIXED_LENGTH and Announce struct in Rust/C. P2 security consistency. Tagged codereview. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-3i18
